35478.title: Better Together? The Impact of Cash Transfers and Couples' Financial Planning on Household Dynamics and Economic Outcomes
35478.zh_title: 携手共进？现金转移与夫妻财务规划对家庭动态和经济结果的影响
35478.authors: Sarika Gupta, Jessica Leight, Daniel W. Maggio, Simone G. Schaner
35478.zh_abstract_excerpt: 家庭最具后果的经济决策通常是共同做出的，然而行为干预通常针对个人，并优化以克服个人内部的约束。我们使用一项随机对照试验来研究针对夫妻的行为干预能否克服与家庭内部决策相关的人际约束。在利比里亚农村地区，我们在一次大规模无条件现金转移之上叠加了一项有引导的联合财务规划练习，评估其相对于仅现金转移和纯对照组的效果。与仅现金转移相比，增加规划提高了用于生产性投资的转移金额比例，从而使经济结果改善了0.16个标准差单位。
35478.abstract: Households' most consequential economic decisions are usually made jointly, yet behavioral interventions are typically targeted to individuals and optimized to overcome intra-personal constraints. We use a randomized controlled trial to study whether behavioral interventions targeted to couples can overcome interpersonal constraints related to intra-household decision-making. In rural Liberia, we layer a facilitated joint financial planning exercise atop a large unconditional cash transfer, assessing effects relative to cash only and a pure control. Relative to cash only, adding planning increases the amount of the transfer spent on productive investment and consequently improves economic outcomes by 0.16 standard deviation units. However, for households with the highest ex-ante conflict risk, these gains come at the cost of additional intimate partner violence.
35478.zh_abstract: 家庭最具后果的经济决策通常是共同做出的，然而行为干预通常针对个人，并优化以克服个人内部的约束。我们使用一项随机对照试验来研究针对夫妻的行为干预能否克服与家庭内部决策相关的人际约束。在利比里亚农村地区，我们在一次大规模无条件现金转移之上叠加了一项有引导的联合财务规划练习，评估其相对于仅现金转移和纯对照组的效果。与仅现金转移相比，增加规划提高了用于生产性投资的转移金额比例，从而使经济结果改善了0.16个标准差单位。然而，对于事前冲突风险最高的家庭，这些收益是以增加亲密伴侣暴力为代价的。

35477.title: In Sickness and in Health: Retirement Responses to Spousal Health Shocks
35477.zh_title: 疾病与健康：对配偶健康冲击的退休反应
35477.authors: Hyeran Chung, Haena Lee, Sita Slavov
35477.zh_abstract_excerpt: 健康冲击是退休的主要驱动因素之一。然而，关于这一主题的现有文献往往不考虑退休发生的婚姻背景。利用1992-2022年健康与退休研究以及交错双重差分方法，我们调查了配偶健康冲击如何影响退休转变。我们还研究了这些影响是否因性别和健康保险状况而异。我们考虑了健康冲击的多种定义，包括自评健康下降、新增诊断、住院、自付医疗支出增加以及功能恶化。我们的结果表明，在配偶新诊断出健康状况或住院后，退休概率增加了1.2至1.3个百分点（12%至13%）。
35477.abstract: Health shocks are a major driver of retirement. However, the existing literature on this topic tends not to consider the marital context in which retirements occur. Using the 1992-2022 Health and Retirement Study and staggered difference-in-differences methods, we investigate how spousal health shocks impact retirement transitions. We also investigate whether these effects differ by gender and health insurance status. We consider multiple definitions of health shocks, including self-reported health declines, additional diagnoses, hospitalizations, increases in out-of-pocket medical spending, and functional deterioration. Our results suggest that the probability of retirement increases by 1.2 to 1.3 percentage points (12 to 13 percent) after a spouse’s new health condition diagnosis or hospitalization. These retirements tend to occur earlier than anticipated. They also tend to be concentrated among women and respondents with employment-based health plans that include retiree coverage for their spouse.
35477.zh_abstract: 健康冲击是退休的主要驱动因素之一。然而，关于这一主题的现有文献往往不考虑退休发生的婚姻背景。利用1992-2022年健康与退休研究以及交错双重差分方法，我们调查了配偶健康冲击如何影响退休转变。我们还研究了这些影响是否因性别和健康保险状况而异。我们考虑了健康冲击的多种定义，包括自评健康下降、新增诊断、住院、自付医疗支出增加以及功能恶化。我们的结果表明，在配偶新诊断出健康状况或住院后，退休概率增加了1.2至1.3个百分点（12%至13%）。这些退休往往比预期更早发生。它们也往往集中在女性和那些拥有包含配偶退休人员保险的就业型健康计划的受访者中。

35476.title: Oligopsony and Collective Bargaining
35476.zh_title: 寡头买方垄断与集体谈判
35476.authors: Tirza J. Angerhofer, Allan Collard-Wexler, Matthew C. Weinberg
35476.zh_abstract_excerpt: 面临有限劳动力市场竞争的雇主可能将工资压低至社会最优水平以下。工会可以通过集体谈判抵消工资压制，但也可能将工资推高至社会最优水平以上并导致工作配给。我们估计了一个包含劳动力供给、劳动力需求以及地方教师工会与宾夕法尼亚州K-12公立学校系统（2013年至2019年）之间工资纳什谈判的结构模型。我们将谈判均衡工资和就业与寡头买方垄断工资设定及社会规划者情景进行比较。
35476.abstract: Employers facing limited labor market competition may suppress wages below socially optimal levels. Unions can counteract wage suppression through collective bargaining, though they may also push wages above the socially optimal level and lead to job rationing. We estimate a structural model of labor supply, labor demand, and Nash-in-Nash bargaining over wages between local teacher unions and school districts in Pennsylvania’s K-12 public school system from 2013 to 2019. We compare negotiated equilibrium wages and employment to oligopsony wage posting and social planner scenarios. On average, oligopsony reduces wages 7 percent below the social optimum, while collective bargaining raises wages 8 percent above it. Averages mask substantial district-level heterogeneity driven by bargaining power variation. Twenty-eight percent of school districts have salaries lower when public schools are unionized than when they are not due to cross-district externalities, where high salaries at one school cause hiring reductions that increase labor supply elsewhere.
35476.zh_abstract: 面临有限劳动力市场竞争的雇主可能将工资压低至社会最优水平以下。工会可以通过集体谈判抵消工资压制，但也可能将工资推高至社会最优水平以上并导致工作配给。我们估计了一个包含劳动力供给、劳动力需求以及地方教师工会与宾夕法尼亚州K-12公立学校系统（2013年至2019年）之间工资纳什谈判的结构模型。我们将谈判均衡工资和就业与寡头买方垄断工资设定及社会规划者情景进行比较。平均而言，寡头买方垄断使工资低于社会最优水平7%，而集体谈判使工资高于社会最优水平8%。平均值掩盖了由谈判能力差异驱动的显著学区层面异质性。28%的学区在公立学校工会化时的工资低于非工会化情况，这是由于跨学区外部性——一个学校的高工资导致招聘减少，从而增加了其他地方的劳动力供给。

35475.title: The Labor Market Impacts of GLP-1s
35475.zh_title: GLP-1类药物对劳动力市场的影响
35475.authors: N. Meltem Daysal, Camille JH. Fredrickson, Ida L. Kristiansen, Mircea Trandafir, Jonathan Zhang
35475.zh_abstract_excerpt: 我们利用关联的丹麦行政数据和匹配堆叠双重差分设计，估计了GLP-1治疗对劳动力市场结果的因果影响。我们比较了在司美格鲁肽上市头两年内开始GLP-1治疗的患者与四年后开始治疗的观察上相似的患者。我们发现GLP-1治疗使长期病假减少17.3%。我们估计GLP-1启动的总财政收益约为每位就业者年劳动收入的1.3%至1.5%。在四年内，我们没有检测到对收入、劳动力参与率或就业具有统计显著或经济意义的影响。
35475.abstract: We estimate the causal impacts of GLP-1 treatment on labor market outcomes using linked Danish administrative data and a matched stacked difference-in-differences design. We compare patients who initiate GLP-1 treatment during the first two years of Semaglutide availability to observably similar patients who initiate four years later. We find that GLP-1 treatment reduces long-term sickness leave by 17.3%. We estimate total fiscal benefits of GLP-1 initiation of approximately 1.3–1.5% of annual labor income per employed individual. We do not detect statistically significant or economically meaningful impacts on income, labor force participation, or employment over four years.
35475.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的丹麦行政数据和匹配堆叠双重差分设计，估计了GLP-1治疗对劳动力市场结果的因果影响。我们比较了在司美格鲁肽上市头两年内开始GLP-1治疗的患者与四年后开始治疗的观察上相似的患者。我们发现GLP-1治疗使长期病假减少17.3%。我们估计GLP-1启动的总财政收益约为每位就业者年劳动收入的1.3%至1.5%。在四年内，我们没有检测到对收入、劳动力参与率或就业具有统计显著或经济意义的影响。

35474.title: Monopsony and Backloaded Compensation: Theory and Evidence from Public Accountants
35474.zh_title: 买方垄断与延迟补偿：来自公共会计师的理论与证据
35474.zh_abstract_excerpt: 在买方垄断模型中，工资折价导致无谓损失，因此是低效的。然而，在延迟效率工资模型中也会出现折价，这些折价旨在激励早期职业员工付出努力，因此是高效的。为了调和并实证区分这两种机制，我们构建了一个包含劳动力市场势力和内生努力的动态模型。利用美国公共会计师事务所的新数据估计团队生产模型，我们发现了两种机制的证据：初级员工的折价和高级员工的溢价反映了提供激励的延迟补偿，而买方垄断势力则导致“终身”工资折价15%。
35474.abstract: In monopsony models, wage markdowns induce deadweight loss and are therefore inefficient. Yet markdowns also arise in models with backloaded efficiency pay, where they are designed to induce effort among early-career workers and are thus efficient. To reconcile—and empirically distinguish—these two mechanisms, we build a dynamic model incorporating labor market power and endogenous effort. Estimating a team production model on novel data on U.S. public accounting firms, we find evidence of both: markdowns for junior workers and markups for senior ones reflect incentive-providing backloading, while monopsony power induces a ‘lifetime’ wage markdown of 15%.
35474.zh_abstract: 在买方垄断模型中，工资折价导致无谓损失，因此是低效的。然而，在延迟效率工资模型中也会出现折价，这些折价旨在激励早期职业员工付出努力，因此是高效的。为了调和并实证区分这两种机制，我们构建了一个包含劳动力市场势力和内生努力的动态模型。利用美国公共会计师事务所的新数据估计团队生产模型，我们发现了两种机制的证据：初级员工的折价和高级员工的溢价反映了提供激励的延迟补偿，而买方垄断势力则导致“终身”工资折价15%。

35473.title: A Large-Scale Evaluation of Merger Simulations
35473.zh_title: 并购模拟的大规模评估
35473.authors: Vivek Bhattacharya, Gastón Illanes, Avner A. Kreps, José D. Salas, David Stillerman
35473.zh_abstract_excerpt: 前瞻性并购模拟是产业组织和反垄断中常用的工具，但关于其准确性和预测能力的证据有限。我们研究了消费品领域的101起并购，并将价格变化的实际结果与并购模拟的预测进行比较。在我们已完成的并购样本中，并购模拟预测的价格变化通常大于实际变化。尽管存在过度预测，我们发现完整的并购模拟在识别价格变化较大的并购方面，比结构性推定和并购效应的近似值更有效。
35473.abstract: Prospective merger simulations are a commonly used tool in industrial organization and antitrust, but evidence about their accuracy and predictive ability is limited. We study 101 mergers in consumer packaged goods and compare the realizations of price changes with predictions from merger simulations. In our sample of consummated mergers, predicted price changes from merger simulations are typically larger than realized ones. Despite the overprediction, we find that full merger simulations are more effective than both structural presumptions and approximations of the merger effect at identifying mergers with large price changes.
35473.zh_abstract: 前瞻性并购模拟是产业组织和反垄断中常用的工具，但关于其准确性和预测能力的证据有限。我们研究了消费品领域的101起并购，并将价格变化的实际结果与并购模拟的预测进行比较。在我们已完成的并购样本中，并购模拟预测的价格变化通常大于实际变化。尽管存在过度预测，我们发现完整的并购模拟在识别价格变化较大的并购方面，比结构性推定和并购效应的近似值更有效。

35472.title: Estimating the Economic Effects of Federally Funded R&D
35472.zh_title: 估算联邦资助研发的经济效应
35472.authors: Sheila Campbell, Jaeger Nelson, Eli A. Schrag, Heidi L. Williams, Caleb K. Wroblewski
35472.zh_abstract_excerpt: 近年来，国会一直有兴趣改变与研发相关的各项政策。最近的立法包括修改联邦研发投资资助的条款以及影响研发税后价格的税收条款。国会预算办公室（CBO）开发了分析框架，用于估算研发投资变化如何影响经济和联邦预算。本文描述了该机构当前用于模拟联邦研发资助变化经济效应的分析框架，重点介绍了CBO开发的两种不同方法：研发资本存量方法和研发组成部分方法。
35472.abstract: In recent years, there has been Congressional interest in changing various policies related to research and development (R&D). Recent legislation has included provisions that would modify federal funding for R&D investments and tax provisions affecting the after-tax price of R&D. The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) has developed analytical frameworks for estimating how changes in R&D investments affect the economy and the federal budget. This paper describes the agency’s current analytical framework for modeling the economic effects of changes in federal funding for R&D, focusing on two distinct approaches that CBO has developed: an R&D capital stock approach and an R&D components approach.
35472.zh_abstract: 近年来，国会一直有兴趣改变与研发相关的各项政策。最近的立法包括修改联邦研发投资资助的条款以及影响研发税后价格的税收条款。国会预算办公室（CBO）开发了分析框架，用于估算研发投资变化如何影响经济和联邦预算。本文描述了该机构当前用于模拟联邦研发资助变化经济效应的分析框架，重点介绍了CBO开发的两种不同方法：研发资本存量方法和研发组成部分方法。

35471.title: Walking with Feet Tied to the Past: Childhood Exposure to the 1918 Influenza Pandemic and Later-Life Male Mortality
35471.zh_title: 带着过去的束缚前行：童年期暴露于1918年流感大流行与晚年男性死亡率
35471.zh_abstract_excerpt: 许多先前的研究利用跨队列比较并聚焦于子宫内暴露，记录了1918年流感大流行对幸存者晚年结果的持续影响。其中一部分研究考察了对老年健康和死亡率的影响，结果不一。本文通过将分析扩展到评估早期生活和童年期暴露于大流行对老年寿命的影响以及一组候选机制，为文献做出贡献。我们利用与社会保障管理局死亡记录相关联的全量1940年人口普查数据，并采用事件研究和双重差分回归，比较了不同暴露年龄队列的寿命，这些队列基于1918年流感相关死亡率出生在高暴露与低…
35471.abstract: Many previous studies have used cross-cohort comparisons and a focus on in utero exposure to document the lingering effects of the 1918 influenza pandemic on survivors’ outcomes later in life. A subset has examined impacts on old-age health and mortality, finding mixed results. This paper contributes to the literature by extending the analysis to evaluate early-life and childhood exposure to the pandemic on old-age longevity along with a set of candidate mechanisms. We employ Social Security Administration death records linked to the full-count 1940 census and employ event-study and difference-in-difference regressions to compare longevity of cohorts with different age-at-exposure who were born in cities with high versus low exposure based on 1918 influenza-related mortality. Our treatment-on-treated calculations suggest that cohorts with age-at-exposure of 3-8 and 9-11 experience 6.4 and 11.2 months reductions in old age longevity; importantly, we note that these cohorts are often used as “controls” in the broader literature. While our main analysis focuses on males due to data constraints, supplementary results suggest smaller and less precise effects for females. An analysis of census data suggests reductions in health, education and socioeconomic scores as potential mechanisms.
35471.zh_abstract: 许多先前的研究利用跨队列比较并聚焦于子宫内暴露，记录了1918年流感大流行对幸存者晚年结果的持续影响。其中一部分研究考察了对老年健康和死亡率的影响，结果不一。本文通过将分析扩展到评估早期生活和童年期暴露于大流行对老年寿命的影响以及一组候选机制，为文献做出贡献。我们利用与社会保障管理局死亡记录相关联的全量1940年人口普查数据，并采用事件研究和双重差分回归，比较了不同暴露年龄队列的寿命，这些队列基于1918年流感相关死亡率出生在高暴露与低暴露城市。我们的处理组平均处理效应计算表明，暴露年龄为3-8岁和9-11岁的队列，其老年寿命分别减少6.4个月和11.2个月；重要的是，我们注意到这些队列在更广泛的文献中常被用作“对照组”。虽然由于数据限制，我们的主要分析聚焦于男性，但补充结果表明对女性的影响较小且不精确。对人口普查数据的分析表明，健康、教育和社会经济得分的下降是潜在的机制。

35470.title: The U.S. Mortality Crisis as a Preston Curve Reversal
35470.zh_title: 美国死亡率危机作为普雷斯顿曲线逆转
35470.authors: Ritikaa Khanna, Rourke O'Brien, Andrew C. Stokes, Atheendar Venkataramani, Elizabeth Wrigley-Field
35470.zh_abstract_excerpt: 2010年代，尽管实际人均收入持续增长，美国预期寿命却停滞甚至下降。我们利用普雷斯顿曲线将这一模式描述为收入与寿命之间关系的变化。基于1980年至2019年的州级数据和2000年至2019年的县级数据，我们估计了人口加权的普雷斯顿曲线，该曲线将预期寿命与对数实际人均收入联系起来。从1980年到2010年，美国各州遵循经典的普雷斯顿曲线模式：收入上升伴随预期寿命上升。各县在2000年至2010年也遵循相同模式。
35470.abstract: U.S. life expectancy stagnated and declined in the 2010s despite continued growth in real per capita income. We use Preston curves to characterize this pattern as a change in the relationship between income and longevity. Using state-level data from 1980 to 2019 and county-level data from 2000 to 2019, we estimate population-weighted Preston curves relating life expectancy to logged real per capita income. From 1980 to 2010, U.S. states followed the classic Preston curve pattern: rising income was accompanied by rising life expectancy. Counties followed the same pattern from 2000 to 2010. From 2010 to 2019, however, states and counties continued to become richer while life expectancy stagnated or declined. The curves shifted right without shifting up and became steeper, indicating decoupling and divergence: increases in aggregate resources over time no longer produced broad longevity gains, and, in any given year, inequality in life expectancy by income grew. These patterns are robust to alternative temporal anchors around the Great Recession and to substituting education for income. They also appear across sex and racial groups. County-level decompositions are broadly consistent with arguments that longevity has fallen due to widely shared exposures to social deterioration, which may account for the Preston curve reversal. Collectively, we show that the recent U.S. mortality crisis reveals a weakening—and growing inequality—in the conversion of aggregate resources into longevity gains. We conclude that the recent U.S. mortality crisis could be understood not only as a story about particular causes of death, but also as a weakening of institutional and social translation.
35470.zh_abstract: 2010年代，尽管实际人均收入持续增长，美国预期寿命却停滞甚至下降。我们利用普雷斯顿曲线将这一模式描述为收入与寿命之间关系的变化。基于1980年至2019年的州级数据和2000年至2019年的县级数据，我们估计了人口加权的普雷斯顿曲线，该曲线将预期寿命与对数实际人均收入联系起来。从1980年到2010年，美国各州遵循经典的普雷斯顿曲线模式：收入上升伴随预期寿命上升。各县在2000年至2010年也遵循相同模式。然而，从2010年到2019年，各州和各县继续变得更加富裕，而预期寿命却停滞或下降。曲线向右平移而未向上移动，并且变得更加陡峭，这表明脱钩和分化：随着时间的推移，总资源的增加不再带来广泛的寿命增益，并且在任何给定年份，按收入划分的预期寿命不平等加剧。这些模式在围绕大衰退的替代时间锚点以及用教育替代收入时依然稳健。它们也出现在不同性别和种族群体中。县级分解结果与以下论点基本一致：寿命下降是由于广泛共享的社会恶化暴露所致，这可能解释了普雷斯顿曲线的逆转。总体而言，我们表明，近期美国死亡率危机揭示了将总资源转化为寿命增益的能力正在减弱——且不平等日益加剧。我们得出结论，近期美国死亡率危机不仅可被理解为特定死因的故事，也可被理解为制度和社会转化能力的弱化。

35469.title: Severe Cognitive Impairments and Long-term Care in Germany
35469.zh_title: 德国严重认知障碍与长期护理
35469.authors: Elsa Perdrix, Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Johannes Geyer, Peter Haan, Sami Louahlia
35469.zh_abstract_excerpt: 德国长期护理（LTC）受益人数增加，这既源于人口老龄化，也源于使认知障碍者更易获得LTC福利的改革。以往研究记录了长期护理的成本及其演变。然而，关于患有认知障碍的老年人的具体情况知之甚少。因此，我们衡量了认知障碍的经济成本，包括广泛的医疗、护理和居家长期护理。我们使用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查（SHARE）第9波数据。我们观察到4%的居家老年人患有严重认知障碍（SCI）（Langa等人（2017）定义）。
35469.abstract: Germany experiences an increase in LTC recipients, due to population ageing but also to reforms which made LTC benefits easier accessible for individuals with cognitive impairments. Previous studies documented the cost of long-term care, and how it evolved. However, less is known about the specific case of elderly people suffering from cognitive impairment. Thus, we measure the economic costs of cognitive impairment, which include extensive medical, nursing care and at-home long-term care. We use the SHARE, the Survey on Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe, Wave 9. We observe 4% of elderly people living at home with severe cognitive impairment (SCI) (Langa et al. (2017) definition). These individuals are 30% more likely to receive any care, and obtain on average 6 more hours of formal care and 6 more hours of informal care per week. The main driver is not the cognitive impairment per-se but the limitation in activities of daily living (ADLs) which SCI leads to. Thus, once controlling for ADLs, SCI does not explain any additional probability to use care. However, because people with SCI are more likely to have ADLs, the annual cost of their care is estimated to 10,000 euros per year per individual on average.
35469.zh_abstract: 德国长期护理（LTC）受益人数增加，这既源于人口老龄化，也源于使认知障碍者更易获得LTC福利的改革。以往研究记录了长期护理的成本及其演变。然而，关于患有认知障碍的老年人的具体情况知之甚少。因此，我们衡量了认知障碍的经济成本，包括广泛的医疗、护理和居家长期护理。我们使用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查（SHARE）第9波数据。我们观察到4%的居家老年人患有严重认知障碍（SCI）（Langa等人（2017）定义）。这些个体接受任何护理的可能性高出30%，平均每周多获得6小时正式护理和6小时非正式护理。主要驱动因素并非认知障碍本身，而是SCI导致的活动日常活动（ADL）限制。因此，在控制ADL后，SCI不再解释任何额外的护理使用概率。然而，由于SCI患者更有可能存在ADL限制，其护理年成本平均估计为每人每年10,000欧元。

35441.title: Cognitive Aging and Long-Term Care in Italy
35441.zh_title: 意大利的认知老化与长期护理
35441.authors: Agar Brugiavini, Ludovico Carrino, Gloria Moroni, Rinaldo Naci, Giacomo Pasini
35441.zh_abstract_excerpt: 本章考察了意大利长期护理系统中老年人认知障碍的发生率及其经济负担。利用SHARE第9波数据（2022年），通过标准化记忆和计算能力测试衡量认知障碍，将65岁及以上人口的8.6%归类为认知障碍者。认知衰退随年龄急剧上升，并与更高的护理需求（尤其是密集的正式护理）密切相关。虽然身体障碍者和认知障碍者都严重依赖非正式护理，但认知障碍者获得的护理时数显著更多。长期护理总成本达353亿美元（占GDP的1.66%），其中认知障碍者占支出最大份额。
35441.abstract: This chapter examines the incidence and economic burden of cognitive impairment among older individuals in Italy within the long-term care (LTC) system. Using SHARE Wave 9 data (2022), cognitive impairment is measured through standardized memory and numeracy tests, classifying 8.6% of individuals aged 65+ as cognitively impaired. Cognitive decline rises sharply with age and is strongly associated with higher care needs, particularly intensive formal care. While both physically and cognitively impaired individuals rely heavily on informal care, cognitively impaired individuals receive substantially more hours of care. Total LTC costs amount to $35.3 billion (1.66% of GDP), with cognitively impaired individuals accounting for the largest share of expenditures. Informal care represents a greater financial burden than formal care across all groups. The findings highlight significant unmet care needs and underscore the urgent necessity of policy reforms and healthy ageing strategies to ensure LTC sustainability.
35441.zh_abstract: 本章考察了意大利长期护理系统中老年人认知障碍的发生率及其经济负担。利用SHARE第9波数据（2022年），通过标准化记忆和计算能力测试衡量认知障碍，将65岁及以上人口的8.6%归类为认知障碍者。认知衰退随年龄急剧上升，并与更高的护理需求（尤其是密集的正式护理）密切相关。虽然身体障碍者和认知障碍者都严重依赖非正式护理，但认知障碍者获得的护理时数显著更多。长期护理总成本达353亿美元（占GDP的1.66%），其中认知障碍者占支出最大份额。在所有群体中，非正式护理的经济负担均大于正式护理。研究结果揭示了大量未满足的护理需求，并强调了政策改革和健康老龄化战略的紧迫性，以确保长期护理的可持续性。
